transport_security.cert_model: Local cert model using trusted CA
transport_security.reverse_proxy: Optional reverse proxy (NGINX/Envoy) for rate limiting and TLS offloading

authn_authz.model: OAuth2/OIDC integrated with centralized identity provider

auditability.ledger: Immutable audit ledger tracking all operator interactions
auditability.event_ids: Unique, traceable UUID event IDs mapped to every request
auditability.actions: Log of all operator actions (approved, executed, failed)

supply_chain.sbom: Automated SPDX JSON SBOM generated on every commit/tag
supply_chain.provenance: SLSA level 3 compliant in-toto provenance mapping
supply_chain.signing: Cosign container/artifact keyless or key-based signing
supply_chain.checksum: Strict directory-level and artifact-level SHA256 checksum policy

runtime_safety.mutation_gates: All database/system write requests require dual-operator approval
runtime_safety.approval_gates: Multi-party consensus required for any run-level prompt changes
runtime_safety.execution_policy: Strict dry-run validation before actual execution

deployment.separation: Strict physical/logical isolation between local_dev, staging, and production environments
deployment.rollback: Automated zero-downtime rollback triggers on health check failures
deployment.release_gates: Automated contract testing verification at deployment gates

observability.logs: Structured JSON logging containing trace and correlation IDs
observability.health: Active endpoint health probes verifying telemetry binding
observability.metrics: INP, LCP, error rates, and resource utilization dashboards
observability.error_boundaries: UI error boundaries isolating component failure cascades

backup_recovery.restore_validation: Automated weekly restore testing in isolated sandbox

compliance.ato_evidence: Traceable NIST/SLSA security evidence artifact generation
compliance.disclaimer: Produces ATO-supporting evidence, does not make actual ATO claim
